manifest.name: Open or Create File

name: Open or Create File

releases.author: iparips
releases.description:
# Bug Fixes

  - Fixed a settings sync issue where an external reload (e.g. via Obsidian Sync) would replace all
  commands with the built-in default if any single command was in an invalid state — for example,
  while a new command was being configured in the settings tab. Only the invalid command(s) are now
  removed; valid commands are preserved and remain registered. A notice confirms how many commands
  were dropped.

# Improvements

  - Settings files written by older versions of the plugin (which used the commandConfigs field) are
  now handled correctly when loaded alongside the current format. This prevents data loss in
  mixed-version scenarios, such as Obsidian Sync pushing a file written by an older device.

# Internal

  - Significant refactoring of the settings layer: introduced CreateOrOpenFilePluginSettings and
  OpenOrCreateCommandConfiguration model classes, consolidated validation into a dedicated
  common/validation directory, and extracted parseSettings as a single entry point for all settings
  loading.

# Compatibility

  - Requires Obsidian v0.15.0+
  - Compatible with all operating systems

# Full Changelog

https://github.com/iparips/open-or-create-file-obsidian-plugin/compare/0.3.1...0.3.2
releases.name: Fix settings sync discarding valid commands on partial invalid state

releases.author: iparips
releases.description:
What's New in v0.3.1

  🚀 New Features

  - Real-time Settings Synchronisation: Plugin settings now automatically sync across devices when using Obsidian Sync. Changes made on one device will
  be reflected immediately on other devices without requiring a restart.
  - Settings Validation with User Feedback: Invalid settings are now detected and reported with clear error messages via notifications, ensuring users
  are informed when configuration issues occur.

  📝 Documentation

  - Updated unit test guidelines with best practices for test organization and mocking
  - Added test structure guidelines for context-based test organization


  Full Changelog: https://github.com/iparips/open-or-create-file-obsidian-plugin/compare/0.3.0...0.3.1
releases.name: Settings Synchronisation via Obsidian Sync

releases.author: iparips
releases.description:
## New Features

  Use Previous Note as Template
  - Added ability to use the previous period's note as a template when creating new notes
  - Automatically detects time-shift patterns (daily, weekly, monthly, yearly) from your file path patterns
  - Finds the most recent matching note to use as template content
  - New toggle in command settings to enable/disable this feature per command

  Documentation

  - Added maintainability rules for LLM-assisted development
  - Added unit testing guidelines
  - Documented release process
  - Added requirements documentation for the template feature

  Technical Changes

  - Bumped version to 0.3.0
  - Added new previous-note-candidate-finder module with time shift detection
  - Extended command settings to support usePreviousNoteAsTemplate option
  - Improved validation and type guards for settings
releases.name: Feature: Option to use last period's note as a template
